digest.component_or_area: rebar plan-review project portability criterion and Pass-4 coaching move
propositions: Add an activated project plan-review criterion project.portability that runs in Pass 1 at container and leaf scope to warn when a plan bakes rebar-project assumptions into reusable behavior.

The finder emits a portability finding only when it supplies a plan citation, a different supported client shape, the causal failure mechanism, and a specific observable breakage; silence and configuration-scoped specialization are not findings.

Add a project-scoped Pass-4 coaching move project-portability that applies only when project.portability survives review and renders a locked portability rework template, without adding a generic core move.
Existing four-pass kernel behavior, Pass 2 adjudication, Pass 3 decisions, and overlay-absent plan-review must remain unchanged.
A balanced three-run live evaluation must show recall 1.0 and false-accept rate 0.0 across PORT-F1..F4 and PORT-N1..N4 with kappa at least 0.70.
Deliver via four dependency-ordered children covering finder activation, coaching move, live calibration, and dogfood documentation plus regression gates.
